text.title: Reporting Basics Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Reporting Basics artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: vanity KPI (hours_logged); only 1 KPI (need >=3); KPI missing threshold + source; narrative <80 chars; no escalation_flags; empty distribution_list.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
